name: agentic-loop
description: Drives tasks through PLAN → BUILD → VERIFY → REVIEW as a supervised, main-agent-driven loop with git isolation, trusted verdicts, a task backlog, and an audit trail. Tasks are authored and gated by the /agentic-loop:engineering verbs (interview → draft → approve; the loop plans right before execution and parks the plan for the approve gate). Four experimental sitter kinds (/agentic-loop:pr-sitter, review-sitter, dep-sitter, main-sitter) watch hosted surfaces and drive fixes with every terminal call human.
